title: The Obsequious Ornamental Ostrich
content:
The Obsequious Ornamental Ostrich,
    who wore Boots to keep his
    feet quite dry.
meaning:
"The Obsequious Ornamental Ostrich" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
